text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
All right, it's 3 p.m. Our experiment has ended, but... The more
information we collect, the more apparent our differences become...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I was planning to narrow the themes down to one from here, but I get
the feeling it's going to be difficult.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
There's a method I'd like to propose. Please come to the dorm
kitchen after fifth period tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The scheduled time has arrived. I see a vegetable cake, donuts, and a
mille-feuille. Please explain.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
These cakes are based on Bakushin O, Jordan, and Flower. I used our
time spent with each of them as inspiration.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes my parents use this method to organize their thoughts
when they're developing a new recipe, so I tried it out too.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I thought that having tangible ideas in front of us would help more
than just visualizing in our heads. Let's try to find a motif based on
these.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I see. Understood. May I have a detailed description of each cake?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The one on the left is inspired by Bakushin O. In keeping with the
superb example that she sets every day, I made a healthy vegetable
cake.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
In the middle are iced donuts inspired by Jordan. The glistening icing
reflects her bustling social life and glossy nails.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
And on the right, a mille-feuille inspired by Flower's kindness. I based
the colors on the flowers she keeps in the garden.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Scan complete. There are a multitude of themes—exemplary
standards, nails, flowers, a bustling social life, kindness...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Apologies. I estimate that I will need roughly an hour to analyze the
ideas and determine their commonalities. Will that be all right?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Of course.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Although... I knew that the process would be trial and error, but we're
making slow progress...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
We have eight days, nineteen hours, and fifty-five minutes left until
the contest. I would like to decide on our motif by the end of today...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's 2:56 p.m. We have to start heading to training. Let's
reconvene about the motif later.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: See you again after training.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Excellent! It's a clear and sunny day—perfect Bakushin weather!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Confirmed sighting of Bakushin O at the gates. Analysis indicates that
she is preparing for a run.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: One, two, three, four... Phew...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ah! Whoops, forgot I'm on the ramps today.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: It's Flower and Jordan...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Huh? I sense slight surprise in your tone. Is something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
No, it's just... It's time for training, so it's only natural to see them
here, but...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It just dawned on me that even though we lead such separate lives,
we all come together for training at the same time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ka-chak!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Bakushin, Bakushin, Bakushiiin!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Classmate A
text_block_list.text: Way to go! Nice starting dash, Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Classmate B
text_block_list.text:
But you know, that's a 3,000-meter race. Funny how she's never
satisfied with sticking to sprints.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ba... Bakushiiin!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Classmate A
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, she's so close to the finish line but she's losing steam.
You're almost there, Class Rep!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Baku... Baku... Bah... Shiiin...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Nnnuuuh! I didn't win! What an inadequate show!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: However, I will not sulk about it! Because I'm the class representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I vow to set a fine example for everyone by winning the next race!
Bakushin, Bakushin, BAKUSHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Bakushin O...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Daaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Aaah... Oh man... My legs are on fire...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: But I'm not done yet! Okay, one more lap!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Today's regimen is... starting dash drills, sprint drills, and some pace
running to work on my form, right?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: All right! Let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Gasp...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Flash?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: The desire to win.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I-I've got it! It's the desire to win! Every student in this academy wants
to win—no matter who they are.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, I jumped ahead to the conclusion. What I mean is, I found the
thing that ties all the students of Tracen Academy together.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
There's Bakushin O, who always tries to lead by example in both her
student life and on the race track. In all departments, she wants to
win.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Jordan pays close attention to her nails, not only for beauty's sake,
but because she considers it a path to success.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: My nails are the secret to my success... so let's hit up the nail care aisle.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Flower likes to make others happy. I could tell that by looking at her
garden. I suspect that's her motivation for racing, too.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I want to get stronger so I can make everyone even happier!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Even though everyone's daily life looks different, at the core, we're
all driven by the desire to win.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: That's what Tracen Academy is all about!
